home.aboutText: Shaheen School is one of the iconic institutions of higher education, distinguished by its compassion to produce well-rounded individuals with competence for improving the human condition and building the nation.
home.visionText: To be a beacon of educational excellence, empowering every child to discover their potential and contribute meaningfully to society.
home.missionText: Providing holistic education that blends academic rigour with moral values, creative thinking, and physical fitness.
home.academicHighlightsDesc: World-class facilities designed for modern education.
home.departmentsDesc: Science, Commerce, Arts, and specialized vocational streams.
home.smartClassroomsDesc: Interactive whiteboards and projectors in every classroom.
home.scienceLabsDesc: Fully equipped Physics, Chemistry, and Biology laboratories.
home.libraryDesc: 10,000+ books with a quiet, air-conditioned reading area.
home.sportsComplexDesc: Cricket ground, basketball court, indoor games, and gym.
home.programsDesc: A comprehensive curriculum designed for every stage of a student's journey.
home.primaryDesc: A nurturing foundation with focus on literacy, numeracy, and creative exploration.
home.secondaryDesc: Rigorous academics combined with sports, arts, and leadership development.
home.highDesc: Advanced streams in Science, Commerce, and Arts with dedicated labs and career guidance.
home.campusLifeDesc: Glimpses of activities, events, and everyday life at Shaheen.

home.subject: Subject

about.label: About Us
about.title: Our Story & Vision
about.subtitle: From a humble beginning to a premier institution — Shaheen has been shaping futures for over two decades.
about.historyP1: Founded with the vision of providing quality education accessible to all, Shaheen School began as a small institution with just a handful of students. Today, it has grown into a campus that houses both Shaheen School (Nursery to Class 10) and Shaheen High School (Class 11–12 / PUC), serving over 3,000 students with state-of-the-art facilities, dedicated faculty, and a track record of academic excellence.
about.historyP2: Our journey has been defined by an unwavering commitment to holistic development — where academic achievement goes hand in hand with character building, sports, arts, and community service.
about.visionText: To be a beacon of educational excellence, empowering every child to discover their potential, embrace lifelong learning, and contribute meaningfully to society.
about.missionText: Providing holistic education that blends academic rigour with moral values, creative thinking, and physical fitness — fostering confident, compassionate leaders of tomorrow.
about.principalQuote: "Education is not merely about examinations and marks. It is about building character, instilling curiosity, and preparing our children to face the world with confidence and compassion. At Shaheen, every child matters."
about.ourManagementDesc: Guided by experienced educators and visionary leaders.

academics.subtitle: Comprehensive education from nursery to higher secondary under one roof.

academics.extraDesc: Developing well-rounded individuals through diverse activities.
academics.sportsAcademyDesc: Cricket, football, athletics, kabaddi with professional coaches.
academics.artsCultureDesc: Music, dance, drama, and annual cultural festivals.
academics.computerLabsDesc: Modern labs with coding & robotics programs.
academics.scienceLabsDesc: Physics, Chemistry, and Biology labs with latest equipment.
academics.languageProgramsDesc: English communication skills, Urdu, Hindi, and Arabic.
academics.libraryDesc: 10,000+ books, periodicals, and digital reading resources.

admissions.label: Admissions
admissions.title: Join the Shaheen Family
admissions.subtitle: Admissions are open for the 2026–27 academic year. Follow the steps below and submit your inquiry.
admissions.step01Desc: Submit the online inquiry form with student & parent details.
admissions.step02Desc: Bring original documents to the school office for verification.
admissions.step03Desc: Student appears for an age-appropriate assessment.
admissions.step04Desc: Pay fees and complete enrollment to secure the seat.
